assessment.note: Skipped answer provides no signal for wellbeing or engagement.

new_queue.label: Energy check
new_queue.name: What might be contributing to feeling a bit flat this week?
new_queue.description: Explores potential reasons behind Priya's quieter energy levels post-launch.

new_queue.label: Refactor recognition
new_queue.name: How did the team recognition for the payments refactor land with you?
new_queue.description: Checks if the recognition for the refactor felt appropriate and meaningful to Priya.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Mentoring interest
new_queue.name: What would a meaningful mentoring opportunity look like for you right now?
new_queue.description: Probes Priya's interest in mentoring and what she envisions it to be.

new_queue.label: Post-launch focus
new_queue.name: After the payments refactor, where do you personally want to direct your energy next?
new_queue.description: Explores Priya's personal priorities and interest post-refactor.

new_queue.label: Manager support needs
new_queue.name: What support do you need from me as projects evolve?
new_queue.description: Ensures Priya feels supported and can express any needs for managerial support.

new_queue.label: Next steps
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?
new_queue.description: Concludes the check-in by focusing on Priya's next steps and commitments.
